settings.heading: We're here. Talk to us.
settings.body: We read every message. Skincare questions, orders, returns — all of it. Whether you have a question about your order, our formula, or just want to know if CLARTÉ is right for your skin — our team is ready.
settings.promise: We reply to every message within 24 hours.

settings.question: Can I return CLARTÉ?
settings.answer: Yes. Return within 30 days. Contact us first so we can arrange it. Refunds processed within 5 working days of receiving your return.

settings.question: My order has not arrived.
settings.answer: Check your shipping email for tracking. Most orders arrive in 3–5 working days. Over 7 days? Contact us at hello@clarteserum.com and we will sort it immediately.

settings.question: Can I use CLARTÉ on sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Yes. Start 3 nights per week for the first 2 weeks. See the full guide on our FAQ page.

settings.title: Secure Checkout
settings.detail: SSL-encrypted. Your data is never stored or shared. Shopify-hosted payments.

settings.title: 30-Day Returns
settings.detail: No visible improvement in 30 days of regular use? We refund you. No questions asked.

settings.title: Real Ingredients
settings.detail: EU-compliant formula. Fragrance-free. 24-hour reply on all business days.
